meta.alertTicker: ⚠ ACTIVE CONFLICT — Day 6 of US–Israel strikes on Iran | Death toll in Iran exceeds 2,400 | Iran launches Operation True Promise IV | 17 Iranian naval vessels destroyed by CENTCOM | Qatar suspends all flights | IAEA: Iran's nuclear programme compromised | US military confirms 6 soldiers killed | 163 Iranian cities across 24 provinces targeted

globalStats.label: Deaths in Iran
globalStats.source: Source: Hengaw Organization for Human Rights

globalStats.label: Deaths in Israel
globalStats.sub: ~3,238 wounded · 9 killed in single Beit Shemesh strike

militaryAssets.label:
Israeli jets used
in first wave

timeline.title: Israel strikes Iran — The 12-Day War
timeline.desc: Israel bombs Iranian nuclear and military facilities in a surprise attack. Kills IRGC commanders, nuclear scientists. Iran retaliates with 550+ ballistic missiles and 1,000+ drones.

timeline.title: US enters war — strikes Natanz, Fordow, Isfahan
timeline.desc: Bunker-buster strikes on Iran's three primary nuclear facilities. Iran retaliates against Al Udeid base in Qatar.

timeline.title: Ceasefire brokered by US
timeline.desc: Fragile ceasefire ends 12-Day War. Final toll: 1,190 killed in Iran, 28 in Israel. Iran's air defenses largely destroyed.

timeline.title: IAEA discovers hidden enriched uranium
timeline.desc: IAEA finds Iran concealed highly enriched uranium in undamaged underground facility. Declares cannot confirm peaceful purposes.

timeline.title: 🔴 Operation Roaring Lion + Epic Fury — Day 1
timeline.desc: US & Israel begin coordinated strikes on Tehran, Isfahan, Qom, Karaj, Kermanshah. Supreme Leader Khamenei's compound destroyed. Trump announces regime change as objective.

timeline.title: Khamenei confirmed killed — Iran launches Operation True Promise IV
timeline.desc: Iran confirms Supreme Leader's death. IRGC vows 'heaviest offensive in history.' Strikes 27 US bases across Middle East. Iran death toll hits 555.

timeline.title: IRGC HQ destroyed · Khamenei's wife dies
timeline.desc: US confirms 6 soldiers killed. CENTCOM destroys 17 Iranian naval ships. Israel bombs Assembly of Experts mid-meeting. Death toll in Iran surpasses 1,045.

timeline.title: State broadcaster hit · 10th wave of Israeli strikes
timeline.desc: IRIB broadcaster headquarters struck. Iran parliament targeted. Ground forces and naval operations announced. Total deaths surpass 2,400. Trump: 'Could last a month.'

regional.name: Bahrain
regional.desc: US 5th Fleet HQ struck multiple times. International airport drone-hit. Residential buildings in Manama struck. 1 Asian worker killed.

regional.name: Qatar
regional.desc: Al Udeid base hit by 2 ballistic missiles. Radar installation drone-struck. All flights suspended indefinitely. Schools moved to remote. 65+ missiles intercepted.

regional.name: Kuwait
regional.desc: Multiple US warplanes crashed (crews survived). 1 girl killed from shrapnel injuries. 3+ killed total.

regional.name: Saudi Arabia
regional.desc: Riyadh and Eastern Province (oil infrastructure) targeted. King Abdulaziz Air Base struck. No confirmed casualties reported.

regional.name: Jordan
regional.desc: 49 drones and ballistic missiles intercepted. Localized property damage from fragments. No casualties.

regional.name: Iraq
regional.desc: Erbil International Airport area struck with visible smoke. Region destabilized. Iranian proxy groups active.

regional.name: Lebanon
regional.desc: 50+ killed, 335+ wounded from Israeli air strikes. Hezbollah launched rocket+drone attack on Haifa military base in retaliation.

regional.name: Red Sea / Suez
regional.desc: Houthi threats resumed. Maersk rerouting vessels via Cape of Good Hope instead of Suez Canal due to risk.

humanitarian.summary: The humanitarian crisis is rapidly deteriorating across Iran and the wider region. Multiple cities remain without power or water after sustained aerial bombardment.

stats.label: Without Electricity
stats.desc: Power grid destroyed in Isfahan, Kermanshah, Qom

stats.label: Food Insecure
stats.desc: Supply chains disrupted in conflict zones

stats.label: Cross-border Refugees
stats.desc: Fleeing to Turkey, Iraq, Pakistan, Afghanistan

economic.summary: The conflict has sent shockwaves through global energy markets and trade routes, with oil prices spiking to levels not seen since the 2022 crisis.

stats.label: Brent Crude Oil
stats.desc: Highest since 2022. Strait of Hormuz tensions driving supply fears.

stats.label: Iran GDP Impact
stats.desc: Estimated economic contraction in 2026. Oil exports halted. Sanctions tightened.

stats.label: Strait of Hormuz
stats.desc: $1.4 trillion annual oil flow threatened. Insurance premiums 800% higher.

stats.label: Global Markets
stats.desc: S&P 500 fell 4.1%, FTSE -5.8%, Nikkei -6.2% in first week of Phase 2.

stats.label: Estimated Damage
stats.desc: Infrastructure, military, and economic damage across all countries and regions.

stats.label: Shipping Costs
stats.desc: Container shipping rates for Middle East routes surged. Suez traffic diverted.
